title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: BEAVERTON HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 13000 SW 2nd Street Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Any student enrolled in the Beaverton School District, including home school and private school and income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (503) 359-3985 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-3985 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Beaverton School District Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
